summary: Screened 120 scored items from GitHub, PyPI, npm, Open VSX, Bluesky, and changelogs. Top signals cluster around agent memory (bitemporal, semantic, vector), MCP server proliferation, agent evaluation frameworks, sandbox/security tooling, and deployment infrastructure. Key projects: Zeph (memory-first agent), Inite Brain (knowledge graph), Osaurus (macOS harness), AgentEval (.NET eval), mitos (microVM sandbox), memcove (lakehouse memory), searchts (web unlocker), agent-bom (security control plane), forcefield (vibe coding guardrails), agenticow (memory branching), tinysandbox (in-process sandbox), and Vercel Agent Runs (deployment).

candidates.title: bug-ops/zeph: memory-first AI agent with MCP/ACP/A2A
candidates.why_it_matters: Memory-first agent with graph memory, self-learning, multi-model routing, sandboxed tools.

candidates.title: inite-ai/inite-brain-service: bitemporal knowledge graph for agent memory
candidates.why_it_matters: Open-source bitemporal KG with hybrid retrieval, conflict-aware ingest, GDPR forget.

candidates.title: osaurus-ai/osaurus: native macOS harness for AI agents
candidates.why_it_matters: Offline, persistent memory, autonomous execution, cryptographic identity.

candidates.title: AgentEvalHQ/AgentEval: .NET toolkit for agent evaluation
candidates.why_it_matters: Comprehensive eval for tool usage, RAG, stochastic evaluation, model comparison.

candidates.title: mitos-run/mitos: microVM sandbox forking for AI agents on K8s
candidates.why_it_matters: Millisecond Firecracker VM fork, durable workspaces, self-hostable CRDs.

candidates.title: memcove: lakehouse-backed memory service for LLM agents over MCP
candidates.why_it_matters: Persistent memory service exposed via MCP, lakehouse backend.

candidates.title: searchts: web unlocker for AI with MCP server
candidates.why_it_matters: Escalating web access (fetch, JS render, stealth browser) for agents.

candidates.title: msaad00/agent-bom: self-hosted security control plane for AI infra
candidates.why_it_matters: Unifies packages, MCP, agents, cloud into blast-radius findings.

candidates.title: DataScienceTech.forcefield: security guardrails for vibe coding
candidates.why_it_matters: Monitors AI coding agents, blocks dangerous actions, runs security evals.

candidates.title: agenticow: Git for Agent Memory – copy-on-write vector branching
candidates.why_it_matters: Efficient multi-agent memory branching, 83x faster than full copy.

candidates.title: @tinysandbox/tinysandbox: in-process AI agent sandbox for Node.js
candidates.why_it_matters: Lightweight sandbox for running agent code in-process.

candidates.title: Vercel Agent Runs in MCP and CLI
candidates.why_it_matters: Official Vercel feature for agent deployment and management.

gaps: arxiv paper on CLI AI coding agent adoption at Microsoft (score 36) not included
crates.io gigacode sandbox agent CLI (score 34) not included
docker sandbox images for agent isolation not represented
